Author: xeltor
Name: Xel's Combat AI
Description: Tired of manually babysitting your BossMod settings mid-fight? XCAI handles your positioning, distances, and Ley Lines automatically so you can focus on not dying. Results may vary on the not dying part.
Punchline: Stops you from standing in the wrong place like a dummy.
